title: Allow the user not to use the data center.
description: No-volume "Any region" ephemeral GPU Pod: user picks container-disk size, models download to ephemeral container disk, Terminate stops all spend. App-side only, NO image rebuild (start.sh works on ephemeral /workspace). See plan.md / brief.md.
activeSessionTitle: Claude implementer — MPI-78 no-volume ephemeral Pod

attention.reason: Verified live (2026-06-16): ephemeral model lands on the 60GB container disk (7GB/12%), default 20GB volume unused (0 bytes). cu124 rebuilt with the start.sh /cubric-data fix.
